promotions.headline: SammyC's Skool is Live
promotions.short_detail: Research modules, vendor intel & direct access to Sam.
promotions.full_detail: SammyC's Skool community is now live. Get direct access to Sam, research peptide modules, vendor intel, and community discussion.

promotions.headline: New Partner: Coffee & Peppers
promotions.full_detail: Coffee and Peppers is now a tracked partner on MyPeptidePrice.com. Use code SAMMYC at checkout to save 15% on their full catalog. Confirm final pricing and checkout terms directly on the vendor website.

promotions.headline: 40% off sitewide, stacks to 55% off
promotions.short_detail: Plus free patriotic vial covers, daily winners & a $500 grand prize
promotions.full_detail: Southern Aminos is running a Fourth of July sale with 40% off sitewide, stackable up to 55% off. Every order gets a free patriotic vial cover, with daily winners, five free Adamax 10-vial giveaways, and a $500 grand prize. Runs June 29 through July 4. Confirm the final discount, stacking, and giveaway terms directly on the vendor website.

promotions.headline: SAMMYC boosted to 20% off
promotions.full_detail: Mile High Compounds is boosting code SAMMYC from its standard discount up to 20% off, running July 1 through July 5. Confirm the final discount and checkout terms directly on the vendor website.

promotions.headline: 25% off sitewide, stacks with SAMMYC
promotions.short_detail: Plus a free GLP3 10mg on orders over $300
promotions.full_detail: Instant Peptides is running 25% off sitewide, stackable with the 15% SAMMYC discount. Orders over $300 also receive a free GLP3 10mg. Runs July 2 through July 5. Confirm the final discount, stacking, and gift eligibility directly on the vendor website.

promotions.headline: 20% off first order, plus tiered savings
promotions.short_detail: New customers get 20% off, stacks with 10% SAMMYC. Tiers up to 35% off + 5% Zelle
promotions.full_detail: New customers receive 20% off their first order, stackable with the 10% SAMMYC discount. Solyn also runs a tiered volume discount: 10% off when buying 1 compound, 25% off when buying 5 compounds, 30% off when buying 10 compounds, and 35% off when buying 20 compounds. Paying with Zelle adds another 5% off. Code SAMMYC stacks on top of all tiers. Confirm eligibility and final checkout pricing directly with Solyn Compounds.

promotions.headline: 30% off all products + bonus 10% off FG Listed Products
promotions.short_detail: Stacks with SAMMYC, running through the holiday week
promotions.full_detail: Flawless Compounds is running a Summer Sale with 30% off all eligible products sitewide, plus an additional 10% off FG Listed Products. The discounts stack with eligible 3 pack, 5 pack, 10 pack, and 20 pack options, and code SAMMYC stacks on top. The sale is running through the holiday week, with a Fourth of July update expected on the same deal. Every new batch is now 7X tested, including endotoxins, heavy metals, and sterility. Promotions apply automatically where eligible. Confirm final eligibility and stacking details directly on the vendor website.

promotions.headline: 30% off sitewide
promotions.short_detail: Stacks with SAMMYC, running through the holiday week
promotions.full_detail: Glow Aminos is running a Summer Sale with 30% off sitewide. Code SAMMYC stacks on top of the sale, running through the holiday week with a Fourth of July update expected on the same deal. Confirm final eligibility and stacking details directly on the vendor website.
